flashcards.definition: Intense tropical cyclone with sustained winds ≥119 km/h; fueled by warm ocean water (≥26.5°C); has a calm eye.
Violently rotating column of air extending from a thunderstorm to the ground; most destructive winds on Earth.
Abnormal rise in sea level caused by a hurricane's winds pushing water onshore; often the deadliest aspect.
Rates hurricanes Category 1-5 based on sustained wind speed; Category 5 = 252+ km/h.
Rates tornadoes EF0-EF5 based on observed damage; EF5 = total destruction of well-built structures.
